retier_rationale: Classifier false-positives: 'auth' fired on incidental ->middleware('auth') string; 'tenant' fired on existing {tenant} route-param plumbing. No auth/login/session logic and no tenant-isolation logic changed. Real blast radius = nav/UI refactor across Tasks+Opportunities list/board surfaces. Re-tiered to 2; carrying forward a tenant-isolation cross-team probe on the new board routes + board drag/drop functional check as due-diligence.
